# Pull Request

## What Does This Change?

_Brief description of what you changed and why._

## Which Guide Does This Affect?

_e.g. n8n-sea-guide, ai-gtm-playbook/workflows/05-cold-email-outreach.md_

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (corrects broken link, outdated info, or wrong steps)
- [ ] Content update (updated pricing, tool version, or instructions)
- [ ] New content (new guide, workflow, or template)
- [ ] Structural improvement (better formatting, navigation, or clarity)

## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] Written for a non-technical business owner (no assumed coding knowledge)
- [ ] Instructions tested and verified to work
- [ ] Tool pricing/availability checked as of today's date
- [ ] SEA-specific context included where relevant (Malaysia, Singapore, etc.)
- [ ] No affiliate links or sponsored content without disclosure
- [ ] No AI-generated content that hasn't been reviewed and validated

## Additional Notes

_Anything the reviewer should know?_
